differentials.name: Muscle strain
differentials.raw: Muscle strain (= injury at musculotendinous junction from overly forceful muscle contraction)

differentials.name: Delayed-onset muscle soreness =  overuse injury becoming symptomatic hours / days after overuse episode
differentials.raw: Delayed-onset muscle soreness =  overuse injury becoming symptomatic hours / days after overuse episode

differentials.name: Compartment syndrome =  increased pressure within indistensible space of confining fascia leading to venous occlusion, muscle + nerve ischemia, arterial occlusion, tissue necrosis
differentials.raw: Compartment syndrome =  increased pressure within indistensible space of confining fascia leading to venous occlusion, muscle + nerve ischemia, arterial occlusion, tissue necrosis

context: Time of onset:   2-4 weeks after denervation Mechanism: spinal cord injury, poliomyelitis, peripheral nerve injury / compression (ganglion cyst, bone spur), Graves disease, neuritis Predilection for:  hamstring, gastrocnemius m., biceps brachii m.)
